title: Fix `podman image search` missing description
body:
`podman image search` returned wrong results for the image "Description" as
it was mapped to the wrong field ("ID") in the search results.

Signed-off-by: Ralf Haferkamp <rhafer@suse.com>

comments.body:
> Code LGTM, but let's modify/add a test for this failure-case.

Agreed, I am currently looking at that.

/lgtm
/approve
Lets get this in, and handle the test in a different PR.
